attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_TYPE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.INITIAL_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.PROG_ENTRY_ENABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.PROG_ENTRY_REQ_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.INITIAL_PROGRESS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_PROGRESS_ENTRY_PAGE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.WQ_ENABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.WORK_ITEM_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.UOM_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ACTUAL_WQ_ENTRY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.PERCENT_COMP_ENABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.BASE_PERCENT_COMP_DERIV_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_WEIGHTING_DERIV_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.REMAIN_EFFORT_ENABLE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.OBJECT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.ENABLE_DLVR_ACTIONS_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.WF_ITEM_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.WF_PROCESS, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.WF_START_LEAD_DAYS, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES,
(
select TASK_TYPE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES
minus
select TASK_TYPE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.TASK_TYPE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.TASK_TYPE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_TASK_TYPES)
